source.description: Optional posting agent. Defaults to AGENT_BRIDGE_AGENT when configured; an explicit value must match it.

category.description: Entry type: operational | config-change | goal-update | flag | bridge-meta

project.description: Optional immutable message label. Omit for an unlabeled message.

message_id.description: Stable message id. Generated by the bridge when omitted.

target_agents.description: Optional target agent names. Empty or omitted means broadcast.

reply_to_id.description: Optional parent message id for reply threading.

kind.description: Message kind: operational | config-change | goal-update | flag | bridge-meta | handoff | request | result

payload_mime.description: Payload MIME type. Defaults to text/plain for the content column.

payload.description: Optional structured payload stored in metadata.message_envelope.

payload_ref.description: Optional external blob pointer for large payloads.

payload_ciphertext.description: Optional inline encrypted payload for small encrypted messages.

informed_by.description: Optional atrib record hashes (sha256:<64-hex>) this message depends on.

atrib_receipt_id.description: Optional. Signed atrib record receipt_id for the wrapper that signed this post_context call. Set automatically by an atrib-signing wrapper; consumers reading the row use this as the informed_by anchor for cross-process causal edges.

since.description: ISO timestamp. Only entries after this time

project.description: Filter by an exact project label

unacked_by.description: Only entries NOT yet acknowledged by this agent name. Defaults to AGENT_BRIDGE_AGENT when configured.

target_agent.description: Return broadcast entries plus entries targeted to this agent.

ids.description: Legacy numeric entry IDs or v2 UUID message IDs to acknowledge

agent.description: Optional acknowledging agent. Defaults to AGENT_BRIDGE_AGENT when configured; an explicit value must match it.
